# AI Tool Watch

> What can this AI actually do?

A plain-English reference for AI capabilities, plans, constraints, and implementations across major subscription AI products (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Grok, Perplexity) and open models.

Maintained by PAICE.work. Updated weekly via multi-model verification cascade.

## What this site covers

- 18 capabilities (e.g., Search the Web, Generate Images, Write and Edit Code)
- 72 implementations across 6 subscription AI products
- 11 open-model access records (Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mistral, Codestral)
- Plan-level availability (which subscription tier unlocks what)
- Surface availability (web, desktop, mobile, terminal, API)
- Gating (free, paid, limited)
- Evidence with sources and changelog for every claim

## Machine-readable API

Stable JSON exports at: https://aitool.watch/api/v1/

Start with the index: https://aitool.watch/api/v1/index.json

### Available files

- [capabilities.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/capabilities.json): All capabilities with search terms, definitions, and cross-links
- [products.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/products.json): All products with provider links and implementation lists
- [implementations.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/implementations.json): All implementations with capability mappings and evidence
- [providers.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/providers.json): All providers with product lists
- [model-access.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/model-access.json): Model access records with deployment and constraint details
- [evidence.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/evidence.json): Evidence records with sources and changelog
- [capability-matrix.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/capability-matrix.json): Capability x product availability grid
- [product-comparisons.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/product-comparisons.json): Pairwise product capability overlap
- [plan-entitlements.json](https://aitool.watch/api/v1/plan-entitlements.json): What each plan tier unlocks per product

### Data contract

- IDs are stable and safe to use as foreign keys
- Every record includes `verified` and `checked` dates for freshness
- File paths under /api/v1/ are stable within the version
- New fields may be added; existing fields will not be removed within v1

### Usage guidance

- Always include the `verified` date when citing data — the AI landscape changes weekly
- Respect gating and constraints — "available" does not mean "available to everyone"
- Don't strip caveats from talking points — they contain important context about restrictions
- Cache for up to 24 hours; don't poll more than once per hour
- Attribution appreciated: "Data from AI Tool Watch (https://aitool.watch/) by PAICE.work"

## Agent access

- [agents.json](https://aitool.watch/agents.json): Agent capability manifest describing API endpoints and MCP tools
- [MCP server](https://github.com/snapsynapse/ai-tool-watch/blob/main/scripts/mcp-server.js): 15 read-only tools over stdio JSON-RPC
- [RSS feed](https://aitool.watch/index.xml): Recent feature changes as RSS 2.0

## Site pages

- [Capabilities](https://aitool.watch/): Capability-first homepage (what can AI do?)
- [Products](https://aitool.watch/implementations.html): Product-first detailed availability
- [Compare](https://aitool.watch/compare.html): Side-by-side product comparison
- [Limits](https://aitool.watch/constraints.html): Access tiers, surfaces, and limits
- [Timeline](https://aitool.watch/timeline.html): Chronological view of feature launches and changes
- [About](https://aitool.watch/about.html): About the project
- [Pattern](https://aitool.watch/pattern.html): Knowledge as Code: the development pattern behind this project

## Bridge pages (programmatic)

### Capability checks: /can/{product}/{capability}/
Answers "Can {product} {capability}?" with plan tables, constraints, and evidence.
Example: https://aitool.watch/can/chatgpt/search-the-web/

### Product comparisons: /compare/{product-a}-vs-{product-b}/
Side-by-side capability overlap between two products.
Example: https://aitool.watch/compare/chatgpt-vs-claude/

### Capability landings: /capability/{slug}/
All implementations of a capability across products.
Example: https://aitool.watch/capability/search-the-web/

### Use-case pages: /best-for/{use-case}/
Product coverage grid for a use-case category.
Example: https://aitool.watch/best-for/creative-work/
